topic: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

questions.hindi: मैं रोज़ चावल खाता हूँ।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + V1/V1+s | am/is/are + V1+ing | have/has + V3 | have/has + been + V1+ing
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I eat rice every day."
questions.grammarRule: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
questions.category: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) practice
